title: New Zealand & Australia Bound
excerpt: I decorated the cover of a Moleskine by first writing in calligraphy and then deciding to add some stamps to it. It's the perfect sized notebook for a trip like this, with blank pages calling out for journaling, washi taped…
body:
I decorated the cover of a Moleskine by first writing in calligraphy and then deciding to add some stamps to it. It's the perfect sized notebook for a trip like this, with blank pages calling out for journaling, washi taped business cards and even some notes from new friends.

So excited to be on my way to New Zealand and Australia for Spotlight store visits and my first Better Homes & Gardens Expo. When I was checking in at the Virgin Australia desk, the lady asked, "Are you pregnant?" And I said yes. And she said, "Are you allowed to be flying? How far along are you?" I giggled and answered her questions. Thinking at my next doctor's appointment I will need to get a letter approving my travels just in case. Yikes.

The schedule is a bit jam packed, but I would so love to meet you in person. New Zealand 27th April – Spotlight Christchurch 10am

Brisbane 28th April – Spotlight Capalaba 1pm & Spotlight Indooroopilly 3pm 29th April – Spotlight Kawana Waters 9.30am & Spotlight Everton Park 1.30pm

Perth 30th April – Spotlight Midland 4pm 1st May – Spotlight Joondalup 9.30am & Spotlight Melville 2pm

Melbourne 3rd – 5th May – Better Homes & Gardens Live – Melbourne Showgrounds -          3rd May – Demonstration @ 12pm & 4pm -          4th May – Demonstration @ 12pm & 3pm -          5th May – Demonstration @ 12pm & 4pm -          On stage meet & greet from 10am – 5pm when not demonstrating

I'll try to keep posting regularly on this blog and also on Instagram. Either way, I hope you'll come say hi!
